source_pr.title: planner/core: migrate test-infra to testify for `planner/core/integration_partition_test.go`
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28413 

Problem Summary: migrate test-infra to testify for `planner/core/integration_partition_test.go`

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
- Migrated 29 tests to testify
- Removed all usages and dependencies on `github.com/pingcap/check`, which is
  - `github.com/pingcap/check`
  - `github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testutil`
  - `github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testkit`

### Check List

Tests

- [x] Unit test

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustQuery("select a from tlist order by a").Check(newtestkit.Rows("1", "2", "3", "4", "8", "9")) (planner/core/integration_partition_test.go)
failure_signature: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustQuery("select a from tlist order by a").Check(newtestkit.Rows("1", "2", "3", "4", "8", "9")) (planner/core/integration_partition_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustQuery("select a from tlist order by a").Check(newtestkit.Rows("1", "2", "3", "4", "8", "9")) (planner/core/integration_partition_test.go).
fix_pattern: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustQuery("select a from tlist order by a").Check(newtestkit.Rows("1", "2", "3", "4", "8", "9")) (planner/core/integration_partition_test.go)

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("skip race test") | tk.MustQuery("select a from tlist order by a").Check(newtestkit.Rows("1", "2", "3", "4", "8", "9")) (planner/core/integration_partition_test.go)
